name: EXZEAL
short_description: A sequel that isn’t afraid to be different. EXZEAL is the followup to TRIZEAL Remix, but it’s much more than a simple rehash. Choose between multiple ships and specialize in each one’s weapon system. Will you focus on shooting, shot charging, or close-range attacks? In EXZEAL, it’s your choice.
detailed_description:
A sequel that isn’t afraid to be different. Triangle Service’s EXZEAL is the followup to TRIZEAL Remix, but it’s much more than a simple rehash. Choose between multiple ships and specialize in each one’s weapon system. Will you focus on good old shooting, virtuously patient shot charging, or dangerous but powerful close-range attacks? In EXZEAL, it’s your choice.

Features:

  • 4+ different weapon systems to choose from
  • Two-player local cooperative play
  • Replay support
  • Memorable soundtrack spanning multiple genres of music
  • Includes Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, and Cloud saves

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
